case_title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. KEITH CARTER et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $16.76 FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CARTER, KEITH DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARTER, KEITH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 175 SIXTH ST.,APT.#210,CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, LEASE FORFEITED, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT***SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED MAY-08-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARTER, KEITH
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CARTER, KEITH
DECLARATION RE: OF AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CARTER, KEITH
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CARTER, KEITH

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY SERVED MAY-08-2014, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CARTER, KEITH
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CARTER, KEITH
